title: cyperus digitatus var. aureorufus
intro: Cyperus digitatus var. aureorufus, also known as golden papyrus sedge, is a variety of the Cyperus digitatus plant, which is a type of sedge that belongs to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Cyperus digitatus var. aureorufus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a dried or fresh herb, and can be consumed as a tea, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal benefits.
